case_title: JOHN A SRNKA ET AL VS. PRINCESS CRUISE LINES, LTD.

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,719.26 FILED BY SRNKA, JOHN A POON, MIN AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES, LTD. WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS PRINCESS CRUISES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2017 - CONTINUED TO NOV-30-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR HEARING ON THE MERITS. DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGE TO VENUE IS DENIED. PLAINTIFFS JOHN A SRNKA AND MIN POON ONLY APPEARED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SRNKA, JOHN A POON, MIN AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES, LTD. WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS PRINCESS CRUISES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS JOHN SRNKA AND MIN POON ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES, LTD IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KOREY SEEGMILLER, BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO JOHN SRNKA ON 12/04/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES, LTD. WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS PRINCESS CRUISES
